title: Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple
tagline: Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tirunellikka in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tirunellikka in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Nellivananathar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Mangalanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiru Thangur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vellimalainathar.

topPlaces.name: Kilvelur block
topPlaces.description: Kilvelur block is a revenue block in the Kilvelur taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 51 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil
topPlaces.description: Kannayiranathar Swamy Temple, Thirukkarayil (also called Tirukarahil or Tirukarayil) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukaravasal in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 9th century CE. Shiva is worshipped as Kannayiranathar and his consort Parvathi as Kailasanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kaichinam.

topPlaces.name: Alathambadi
topPlaces.description: Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur
topPlaces.description: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at Kanrappur near Tiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Appar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Valivalam
topPlaces.description: Valivalam is a small town in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the Valivalam village have the new small man helping nature-made forest which is initiated by pasumai valivalam amaippu (environmental volunteers group) in July 2019 with 2500+ trees of 70-75 variety of species in nearly 20000 sq.ft of formerly degraded land by using akira miyawakki method, especially majority of fruit bearing species to attract birds.

topPlaces.name: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple (கோட்டூர் கொழுந்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kottur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Kozhundeeswarar.

items.note: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiru Thangur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vellimalainathar.
Kilvelur block is a revenue block in the Kilvelur taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 51 panchayat villages in this block.

Kannayiranathar Swamy Temple, Thirukkarayil (also called Tirukarahil or Tirukarayil) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukaravasal in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 9th century CE. Shiva is worshipped as Kannayiranathar and his consort Parvathi as Kailasanayaki.
Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kaichinam.
Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at Kanrappur near Tiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Appar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

Valivalam is a small town in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the Valivalam village have the new small man helping nature-made forest which is initiated by pasumai valivalam amaippu (environmental volunteers group) in July 2019 with 2500+ trees of 70-75 variety of species in nearly 20000 sq.ft of formerly degraded land by using akira miyawakki method, especially majority of fruit bearing species to attract birds.

Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple (கோட்டூர் கொழுந்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kottur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Kozhundeeswarar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (102 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirunellikka Nellivananathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple, Kilvelur block, Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil, Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple, Alathambadi.
